Author: Aschy
Name: Combat Statistics
Punchline: Real-time DPS and HPS tracking with encounter history and an overlay.
Description: Tracks DPS, HPS, overheal, pet contribution, and encounter summaries with a compact overlay and detailed breakdowns.
Changelog: v1.0.5: Fixed to only track party members (filtered out NPC damage), moved overlay default position to right-center, improved party member filtering logic.
